title: Add Welcome Landing Page with NIRGRANTHA Branding Before Login

requirements.summary: Create a full-screen welcome landing page displaying 'Welcome to NIRGRANTHA' with brand styling and a call-to-action button that navigates to the role selection page
acceptanceCriteria: The first screen displayed when the app loads is the welcome page, not the role selection or login page.
The welcome page displays the heading 'Welcome to NIRGRANTHA' prominently.
The company name 'NIRGRANTHA' is styled distinctively as a brand name.
A call-to-action button is present that, when clicked, navigates to the role selection / login page.
After clicking the CTA, the role selection login page is shown as the next step.
After a role is selected and login is completed, the appropriate role-specific dashboard is displayed as before.

file_operations.description: Create a new WelcomePage component that displays the NIRGRANTHA brand name prominently with the generated logo image at frontend/public/assets/generated/nirgrantha-logo.dim_480x120.png, a hero heading 'Welcome to NIRGRANTHA', and a call-to-action button (e.g., 'Get Started' or 'Enter Portal'). The component should use the generated hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/nirgrantha-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as a full-screen backdrop with deep gradients and subtle decorative effects. Include a prop `onEnter` callback that triggers navigation to the role selection page when the CTA button is clicked. Apply modern, bold typography for the brand name using the existing design tokens from the project's theme configuration.

requirements.summary: Update App.tsx navigation flow to add 'welcome' as the initial view state, ensuring the sequence: welcome page → role selection → role-specific dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: App initializes showing the welcome page view.
Clicking the CTA on the welcome page transitions to the role selection/login view.
Logging in from the role selection page transitions to the correct role-specific dashboard.
Logging out returns the user to the welcome page (or role selection page at minimum).
No existing dashboard or login functionality is broken.

file_operations.description: Modify the App component to introduce a new view state 'welcome' as the initial state (replacing 'landing' as the first view shown). Import and render the WelcomePage component when the view state is 'welcome'. Wire the WelcomePage's onEnter callback to transition the view to 'landing' (the existing role selection page). Ensure the existing flow from role selection → login → dashboard remains unchanged. Update the logout handler to return users to the 'welcome' view. Preserve all existing AuthProvider, ThemeProvider wrapping, role-based routing, and dashboard rendering logic.

requirements.summary: Apply a visually rich, cohesive design theme to the welcome landing page reflecting NIRGRANTHA's identity as an AI-powered EdTech platform with bold gradients, elegant typography, and modern color palette
acceptanceCriteria: The welcome page has a distinctive, polished visual theme.
The brand name 'NIRGRANTHA' uses large, prominent typography.
The color scheme feels modern and appropriate for an EdTech platform.
The page is fully responsive and looks good on desktop and mobile.

file_operations.description: Add CSS custom properties or utility classes for the NIRGRANTHA welcome page theme using deep teal and gold accent colors that complement the generated hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/nirgrantha-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png. Define typographic styles for the brand name 'NIRGRANTHA' using large, bold, elegant fonts. Ensure the theme integrates seamlessly with the existing portal design tokens and remains consistent with the overall project styling. The color palette should feel modern, professional, and energetic, appropriate for an AI-powered EdTech platform targeting Indian engineering colleges.

Extend the Tailwind configuration to include custom utility classes or theme extensions for the NIRGRANTHA welcome page, such as custom gradient definitions using deep teal and gold tones, large heading font sizes for the brand name, and any additional design tokens needed for the welcome page visual theme. Ensure the extended configuration is additive and does not conflict with existing portal theme configurations (faculty, institute, parent, student).
